raspberrypi-boot-gdata/src/main/java/de/.general_idea: Replace the legacy Arrays.asList() call with the immutable List.of() factory method introduced in Java 9.
Remove the unused java.util.Arrays import after migrating away from Arrays.asList().

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent to 2.6.1 to align with Java 17 support and receive security patches.
Configure the project to compile and run on Java 17.
Update Jackson Databind to 2.12.5 for bug fixes and compatibility.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent to 2.6.1 to align with Java 17 support and receive security patches.
Configure the project to compile and run on Java 17.
Update Google API services OAuth2 dependency to a newer version.
Add explicit dependency for Google HTTP Client Jackson2 integration.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent to 2.6.1 to align with Java 17 support and receive security patches.
Configure the project to compile and run on Java 17.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent to 2.6.1 to align with Java 17 support and modern dependency management.
Update the project's target Java version property from 1.8 to 17.
Add spring-boot-starter-reactor-netty to manage Netty and Reactor dependencies via Spring Boot BOM.
Remove explicit reactor-core dependency as it is now managed by the starter.
Remove explicit reactor-net dependency as it is replaced by the starter.
Remove explicit netty-all dependency as it is now managed by the starter.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 17 instead of JDK 15 to match the target runtime environment.
.github/workflows/maven.yml.human_impl: Changed 'Set up JDK 15' to 'Set up JDK 17' and 'java-version: 15' to 'java-version: 17' in maven.yml.

raspberrypi-boot-server/src/main/resourc.general_idea: Replace local jQuery file with a CDN-hosted version to update the library and reduce local asset management.
